channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: Crohn Disease Presenting as Vaginal Discharge in a Patient With Systemic Lupus Erythematosus.
item.description: Pediatrics - Crohn disease (CD), a subtype of inflammatory bowel disease, may be complicated by extraintestinal manifestations. Although cutaneous findings are among the most frequent, metastatic Crohn disease ...

item.title: Use of medications to treat inflammatory bowel diseases before and during pregnancy in Switzerland between 2012 and 2019: an observational study using the claims-based MAMA cohort.
item.description: BMC gastroenterology - Effective management of Inflammatory bowel diseases (IBD) before and during pregnancy is crucial as women with well-controlled IBD at conception tend to remain in remission throughout pregnancy, ex...

item.title: Medical invalidation and life validation in individuals with Crohn's disease in Japan: A qualitative study.
item.description: Patient education and counseling - This study examined how medical invalidation and "life validation" are enacted in the narratives of individuals living with Crohn's disease in Japan, and how these processes shape care trajectories...

item.title: Live attenuated varicella vaccines in patients treated with tumor necrosis factor-alpha inhibitors: A clinical trial.
item.description: Medicine - Clinical trial - Live vaccines are generally contraindicated in patients treated with biological agents. However, they are often needed in this patient population. This prospective study aimed to evaluate the immun...
